title: geraniospermum proliferum
intro: Geraniospermum proliferum, also known as the Thai angelica, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Thailand and Malaysia, and is a member of the Apiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geraniospermum proliferum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
